ValidationRule.description: Prevents creating a duplicate Re-Engagement Opportunity when one is already open for the same Account. Triggered when the Create Re-Engagement checkbox is checked and Open Re-Engagement Opps is greater than 0.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Recruiting", ISCHANGED(Create_Re_Engagement__c), Create_Re_Engagement__c = TRUE, Open_Re_Engagement_Opps__c > 0 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: A Re-Engagement Opportunity already exists for this advisor. Please check the existing opportunity before creating a new one.
